caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is centered against a solid dark grey background, appearing to speak. She is wearing a light green tunic with small embroidered floral patterns and a decorative neckline, paired with a dark necklace. A small black clip-on microphone is attached to her garment. In the lower corners of the scene, a logo consisting of a stylized circular emblem and the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a stationary position, gesturing with both hands raised in front of her chest to emphasize her speech. Her facial expression shifts slightly as she talks, with her mouth open in different positions across the sequence, while her hands move in small, expressive motions. The setting and clothing remain consistent, with only her facial expressions and hand positions changing as the video progresses.
